title: alyssum serpyllifolium
intro: Alyssum serpyllifolium, also known as creeping thyme or serpyllum, is a flowering perennial plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Alyssum serpyllifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
